reach.title: Global Reach

Home.corporate_subtitle: Treat your talented team to their favourite meals. Let them pick! Explore **flexible corporate food delivery options** and tasty employee perks.

story.title: From baghdad to the world
story.p1: Founded in 2018, JayakHub was born from a simple idea: food delivery should be seamless, reliable, and accessible to everyone.
story.p2: We don't just deliver meals. We connect communities, support local restaurants, and bring people together through the food they love.
story.p3: Today, we're trusted by thousands of restaurants and have delivered millions of orders across Iraq.

Terms.alert: Please read this document carefully. By using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

contractual_relationship.title: 1. Contractual Relationship
contractual_relationship.content: These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern the access or use by you, an individual, from within any country in the world of applications, websites, content, products, and services (the "Services") made available by Jayak Hub.

the_services.title: 2. The Services
the_services.content: The Services constitute a technology platform that enables users of Jayak Hub's mobile applications or websites provided as part of the Services to arrange and schedule delivery services with independent third party providers of such services, including independent third party logistics providers under agreement with Jayak Hub.

use_of_services.title: 3. Your Use of the Services
use_of_services.content: User Accounts. In order to use most aspects of the Services, you must register for and maintain an active personal user Services account ("Account"). You must be at least 18 years of age, or the age of legal majority in your jurisdiction (if different than 18), to obtain an Account.

payment.title: 4. Payment
payment.content: You understand that use of the Services may result in charges to you for the services or goods you receive from a Third Party Provider ("Charges"). After you have received services or goods obtained through your use of the Service, Jayak Hub will facilitate your payment of the applicable Charges on behalf of the Third Party Provider as such Third Party Provider's limited payment collection agent.

Privacy.alert: Please read this document carefully. By using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

info_collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
info_collection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create or modify your account, request on-demand services, contact customer support, or otherwise communicate with us. This information may include: name, email, phone number, postal address, profile picture, payment method, items requested (for delivery services), delivery notes, and other information you choose to provide.

use_info.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
use_info.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, such as to: facilitate payments, send receipts, provide products and services you request (and send related information), develop new features, provide customer support to Users and Drivers, and send updates and administrative messages.

sharing.title: 3. Sharing of Information
sharing.content: We may share the information we collect about you as described in this Statement or as described at the time of collection or sharing, including as follows: with Drivers to enable them to provide the Services you request; with third parties to provide you a service you requested through a partnership or promotional offering made by a third party or us; with the general public if you submit content in a public forum.

data_retention.title: 4. Data Retention
data_retention.content: We retain user data for as long as necessary for the purposes described above. This means that we retain different categories of data for different periods of time depending on the category of user to whom the data relates, the type of data, and the purposes for which we collected the data.

Cookies.alert: Please read this document carefully. By using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

what_are_cookies.title: 1. What are Cookies?
what_are_cookies.content: Cookies are small text files that are sent to or accessed from your web browser or your device's memory. A cookie typically contains the name of the domain (internet location) from which the cookie originated, the "lifetime" of the cookie (i.e., when it expires), and a randomly generated unique number or similar identifier.

how_we_use_cookies.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
how_we_use_cookies.content: We use cookies and other tracking technologies for the following purposes: to properly route traffic for effective server load distribution; to speed up page loading lines; to understand how you use our services and to improve your experience.

your_choices.title: 3. Your Choices
your_choices.content: You have the right to choose whether or not to accept cookies. However, they are an important part of how our Services work, so you should be aware that if you choose to refuse or remove cookies, this could affect the availability and functionality of the Services.

hero.title: How can we help you today?

where_is_my_order.question: Where is my order?
where_is_my_order.answer: You can track your order in real-time through the "My Orders" section in your account. Alternatively, use the tracking link sent to your email.

can_i_cancel.question: Can I cancel my order?
can_i_cancel.answer: Yes, you can cancel your order within 5 minutes of placing it without any charges. After that, cancellation availability depends on the restaurant preparation status.

missing_items.question: My order is missing items.
missing_items.answer: We apologize for the inconvenience. Please report the missing items through the "Help" section in your order details page, and we will process a refund or replacement immediately.

contact.title: Did not find what you were looking for?
contact.subtitle: Our support team is just a click away.

security.title: Bank-Grade Security
security.desc: End-to-end encryption for all payments and personal data.

verified.title: Verified Partners
verified.desc: Strict background checks for every driver and restaurant.

monitoring.title: Live Monitoring
monitoring.desc: Real-time GPS tracking of every order from kitchen to door.

privacy.title: Privacy Shield
privacy.desc: Masked phone numbers to protect your personal contact info.

zero_contact.title: Zero Contact
zero_contact.desc: Contact-free delivery options available for every order.

sos.title: SOS Integration
sos.desc: One-tap emergency assistance directly within the app.

image_card.desc: Every rider completes our 5-point safety training module.

impact.title: Setting the standard for the industry.
impact.desc: We don't just follow safety regulations – we create them. Our standards are 2x stricter than local requirements.

community.title: Community Guidelines
community.desc: Safety is a shared responsibility. We ask everyone in our ecosystem to treat each other with respect, kindness, and patience.
